TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sangelacay, title = sangelacay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sangelacay} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:白色) salengacay a zikuc kalamkam mauning. 白色的衣服容易髒.
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:**) sar~ɾəŋaʦaj a zikuʦ kar~ɾamkam mauniŋ. ********.
S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:白色) salengacay a zikuc kalamkam mauning. 白色的衣服容易髒.
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:**) sar~ɾəŋaʦaj a zikuʦ kar~ɾamkam mauniŋ. ********.
